title: Bridge Essay: Rapid and sustained symptom reduction following psilocybin treatment for anxiety

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Rapid and sustained symptom reduction following psilocybin treatment for anxiety and depression in patients with life-threatening cancer: arandomized controlled trial.** — J Psychopharmacol. PMID: 27909164. DOI: 10.1177/0269881116675512. Clinically significant anxiety and depression are common in patients with cancer, and are associated with poor psychiatric and medical outcomes. Historical and recent research suggests arole for psilocybin to treat cancer-related anxiety and depression. In this double-blind, placebo-controlled, crossover trial, 29 patients with cancer-related anxiety and depression were randomly assigned and received treatment with single-dose psilocybin (0.3 mg/kg) or niacin, both in conjunction with psychothe...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 16 (Visionary Cosmologies). Evaluation: Good (score=2.6)
